meaning: adj.卡嗒卡嗒的,活泼的,很好的adv.极佳,很,非常
examples: This book is a rattling good read.
From the kitchen came a rattling of cups and saucers.
I finally managed to cure the rattling noise in my car.
This had four elements, Eric Van Der Kleij assured me, rattling through his plan.
After some engine complaint, then some rattling and bounding in place, it is driven away.
